title: Make stage-generated tools compile and run every supported example
goal: Advance the bootstrap scripts so stage-generated tools execute every example classified as supported by the parity manifest.
context: This task depends on SELFHOST-002 through SELFHOST-005.
Use supported examples from the self-host parity manifest.
A supported example must complete lex, parse, check, codegen, C compile, and binary run using generated-stage tools.
steps: Update stage check scripts to iterate over all examples marked supported.
Fix the first failing supported example by implementing the smallest missing parser/checker/codegen support.
Ensure expected-failing examples remain explicit and do not silently pass or disappear.
Record any remaining unsupported example reasons in SELFHOST_WORK.md.
done_when: Stage-generated tools run every example currently classified as supported.
The check script fails if a supported example regresses.
The remaining unsupported list is smaller or more precise.
